creator: freebsd@ny-central.org
text:
Created attachment 225344
Updated port diff

Find attached patch for upgrading ganttproject to latest version.

* I've run portclippy and portlint and fixed multiple issues in Makefile and pkg-plist.
* I've also run a qa on poudriere for 12.2 which came out without errors

I'm willing to adopt the port.
Feedback welcome.
Thanks.
